name: ListVolumesOutput
description:
A JSON object containing the following fields:

  • ListVolumesOutput$Marker

  • ListVolumesOutput$VolumeInfos

allOf.description: Use the marker in your next request to continue pagination of iSCSI volumes. If there are no more volumes to list, this field does not appear in the response body.
An array of VolumeInfo objects, where each object describes an iSCSI volume. If no volumes are defined for the gateway, then VolumeInfos is an empty array "[]".
